title: Montessori Teacher
description: We are looking for a passionate, trained Montessori teacher to lead our Nursery or Montessori Level classroom.
requirements: Montessori diploma or Early Childhood Education qualification
Experience working with children aged 2.5–6 years

title: Saturday Coaching Tutor
description: Experienced tutors needed for our Saturday Coaching program. Strong subject knowledge in English, Math, Science, or Urdu required.
requirements: Bachelor's degree (Education or relevant subject preferred)
Teaching or tutoring experience with school-age children
Ability to explain concepts clearly and patiently

title: Evening Academy Instructor
description: Join our Evening Academy team to provide homework support, academic reinforcement, and creative activities for after-school students.
requirements: Good with children and patient demeanor
Comfortable helping with homework across subjects

title: Administrative Assistant
description: Support the school's daily operations — admissions inquiries, parent communication, record keeping, and social media coordination.
requirements: Computer literate (MS Office, WhatsApp, social media)
Friendly and professional with parents and visitors
